title: Versona artifact manifest
description: Index of evidence, reports, diagram exports, and recipe outputs tied to a session or run.

manifest_id.description: Optional opaque id for this manifest instance.

session_id.description: Forge Versona session when manifest lives under that session.

recipe_name.description: agents/recipes/<name>/ when manifest describes a recipe run.

recipe_run_id.description: CI build id, timestamp slug, or other run correlation.

diagram_adapter.description: e.g. blueprint_diagram, svg_asset, diagram_json_ir, external_uri — not a specific vendor grammar.
